title: Triangle Angle
text: We have a north component (60m) and an east component (80m). The resultant points into the northeast quadrant.

title: Apply Arctan Function
text: The vector ends $$80m$$ east and $$60m$$ north of start. The compass bearing from north (clockwise) is $$\arctan\left(\frac{80}{60}\right)$$. What is this value?
